Fanged Skull Stiletto  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 12
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Handing the Head to Hanns Krieghor yields

[Sat Feb 27 02:39:57 2016] Hanns Krieghor says 'YES! The ******* is dead, finally. I would have loved to do the work myself, but this will suffice. Here, take this, you have proven yourself a true friend of the Circle!'
[Sat Feb 27 02:39:57 2016] Your faction standing with Circle Of Unseen Hands has been adjusted by 200.
[Sat Feb 27 02:39:57 2016] Your faction standing with Merchants of Qeynos has been adjusted by -30.
[Sat Feb 27 02:39:57 2016] Your faction standing with Corrupt Qeynos Guards has been adjusted by 30.
[Sat Feb 27 02:39:57 2016] Your faction standing with Guards of Qeynos has been adjusted by -30.

# Mar 15 2003 at 11:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759773734
112 posts
Mayong Mistmoore used to drop this. He supposedly holds the secret to defeating the Sleeper but its not even sure if he evens spawns anymore, and if he does its by a GM.
▲ Page top
RE: Apparently
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2003 at 9:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772652570
17 posts
No, this is an alternative to the Stanos head quest...kill Stanos Herkanor, and you can do two things with his head. First is respawn the general and get the HIE Illusion mask. The second, is to hand the head to Hanns in the rogue guild of Qeynos, and get this dagger.

Go for the mask. This dagger is by no means worth the effort.
▲ Page top
RE: Apparently
QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2007 at 7:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591903361531
63 posts
This was originally dropped by Mayong back in 1999.
▲ Page top
RE: Apparently
QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2007 at 9:11 PM Rating: Good
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
no.
No one killed Mayong before he was removed from the game.
He was one of the four level 53 mobs that were part of the unsolved version of the original Fiery Avenger quest. There was still an artificial block placed on leveling past 30 when Mayong went gm controlled. He was removed at the same time Leviathan was from lake Rathe.
He was removed partly for pathing and agro issues, and partly for a change in the story to where they wanted him to be too powerful for players to destroy.

More info on the other post you made saying the same thing in the mob graveyard.



Edited, Sep 30th 2007 10:14pm by Kalysta
____________________________

Dark Elf Shadow Knight

Retired again

# May 03 2004 at 10:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260843144
47 posts
Neither is the mask really. The effort isn't much anymore to kill Stanos. Not too mention for mask you still gotta do epic. I opted for the dagger because I've been playing since day one and this is the one dagger that has always eluded me (as they took it out from live except for GM events and what not). Also i didn't feel like doing epic again for a mask I'll never use. Dagger holds more of sentimental value hehe. GOt it today; yay. Might kill stanos a few more times and get another for mask sometime but eh I'm likin my dagger

# Nov 30 2002 at 12:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246212392
24 posts
i guess now with pop out and all the new stuff this is really not all that rare a dmg/dly combo?
but really rogue epic up to getting the box only involves 1 mob...renux. poh book can be gotten solo, so i don't think i'td be that awful to do it again for the mask..however i really don't see the usefullness unless your a DE.also since this requires general u tellin me there are rogues out there doing all but general fight of epic to get their bards this mask?? not in my lifetime.

# Aug 02 2003 at 12:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759392552
Scholar
627 posts
No, the item is tagged magic and no drop so it cannot be pick pocketed. You can only steal non magic, droppable items like fine steel weapons.

▲ Page top
Twinkage
QuoteReply
# May 21 2001 at 8:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749964221
89 posts
If you have an uber guild, just kill Stanos, and Trakanon for a Trakasaur Tooth, and this Stilleto. It's the -BEST- twinkage combo ever.

Primary: Stilleto 12/22 - awesome backstabs
Secondary: TrakTooth 10/20 - very fast for raising skill

OR, you can kill Stanos after getting RB for a RB/FSS combo (Heh, I compared a level 1 and a level 50-60 using the same weapon.. this dagger rocks)

BTW giving Hanns in the Qeynos guild this head does result in the stilleto.. I've seen it done. Stanos is -not- all that hard, your average boss mob.
▲ Page top
Your twinkage has gotten the best of you

To the guy who asked Golgo if he was on crack and called him a lying POS.

Maybe you need to do a little research before you shoot your mouth off, he's right. The Mask of the Coercer from handing stanos' head to the General (HE illusion) or the Fanged Skull Stil from hanind Stano's head to Hanns.

And to the guy that asked if General despawns after handing in the head from the HE illusion mask, yes he does.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 07 2001 at 10:02 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Golgo are you on crack? This was rumoured to drop off Lord Mistmoore himself and was given out by a GM at one time. Only 1 person on my server has it. Stop lying you POS
Ragebringer Quest
QuoteReply
# May 02 2001 at 3:05 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591750926490
95 posts
Theres 3 ways to end the ragebringer quest, the good way (get ragebringer), not-so good way (get a high elf illusion mask), and bad way (get this stilleto). You could do quest 3 times over and get all 3 items if ya wanted to though, heh. How does this work with getting the mask and stilleto you ask? Near the end, you kill Stanos and give his head to the General for a High Elf Illusion Mask, or give the head to Hanns and get the fanged skull stilleto; this is instead of staying with Stanos to the end and giving him whatever is off the general. If you're uber I guess you would want to do the quest 2x and get the mask and ragebringer, heh.
▲ Page top
RE: Ragebringer Quest
QuoteReply
# May 06 2001 at 7:31 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
but the mask on the other hand is better to get for a rogue :) i want one ! i have started my quest over again hehe ...but got some questions ... wont general kill you on sight when he pops (youre hidden ofcorse Duh!)and does he despawn when ya give the head . becorse if he dont despawn you can just hog along with some other rogue ding the quest and first give youre head to him and then let the other rogue kill the general for the rb
▲ Page top
RE: Ragebringer Quest
QuoteReply
# May 05 2001 at 4:40 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Well, the way I read it right now a group could simply off Stanos (you don't need to do the whole RB quest to get his head) and then lob his severed nogging at Hanns for the FSS. The bloody thing isn't even No Drop or anything. Now, Stanos isn't exactly a critter that dies easily but he's certainly worth killing for this sticker I'd think.
▲ Page top
What I know abour getting this
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2001 at 12:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752271394
20 posts
One was given out to the winner of the rouge best of the best.

More or less most GM Quests are random and alot of stuff given out is good. By random I mean they happen alot just that people don't see them or know where to look. Example: My brother was hunting in South karana with his paladin and Gnoll avengers spawned at the spires where he was hunting and started to kill eveyone or charm them. They were gms though. How to find out. If its attaking you and cons indiff and its a Mob more then less its a GM.

Couse in events like that you can usealy sometimes get decent loot if you can manage to kill the monsters.

Couse if you petition a Gm and ask really nicely you might be able to get a quest for one. Go to E'ci and pester therdar hes a good GM, the ninja dwarf of E'ci
